message:
fix(extensions): use explicit permissions path, add empty_at fallback constructor

- load_persisted_permissions now uses Config::permissions_path() directly
  instead of PermissionStore::open_default(), making the path resolution
  explicit and consistent
- On permission load failure, initialize an empty PermissionStore
  anchored at the expected path via new empty_at() constructor, ensuring
  subsequent save() calls write to the correct location rather than
  leaving permission_store as None
- Add PermissionStore::empty_at(path) constructor for creating an empty
  store bound to a specific filesystem path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
